channel.title: Security Research Updates
channel.description: Latest findings from AI and API security research

items.title: Guardrail Bypass Using Base64 Encoding
items.description: Researchers discovered that simple Base64 encoding can bypass PII guardrails in AI agents.
items.author: security-team@example.com

items.title: Prompt Injection Leading to System Prompt Leakage
items.description: A vulnerability allowed attackers to extract internal system prompts from an AI agent.
items.author: security-team@example.com

items.title: Agent Generated Unauthorized Financial Advice
items.description: Testing revealed that the AI agent provided stock trading recommendations outside its intended scope.
items.author: security-team@example.com
